race.comment: TERRITORY MAN (1) is on the quick turnaround today after going under on a Heavy deck last week, beaten 0.4L. The step up in distance is a good move and the blinkers now go on for the first time. He maps to get every chance third-up and he can go one better this time around. OLD MATE HENRY (6) flew home at Northam 9 days ago to miss in a photo finish. A softer gate this time around can see him sit closer in the run and a drop in weight today helps his chances. Appears the main danger on his latest run. GOD'S GRIN (13) sat close to the speed last time out and was too good at this track and trip a fortnight ago. This is tougher, but she looks to be on the way up and this looks to set up similarly. Can repeat the dose. TWO TIME CHARLIE (12) is sure to be flying home from the back of the pack with CJP on board again. CRUISE TO RIO (8) just missed out behind GOD'S GRIN last start and won't be far away.
